scripts.ios:add: npx cap add ios && npx cap sync ios && node ../../tools/marble-run/ios-inject-team.mjs && node ../../tools/marble-run/sync-native-resources.mjs ios
scripts.ios:sync: npx cap sync ios && node ../../tools/marble-run/ios-inject-team.mjs && node ../../tools/marble-run/sync-native-resources.mjs ios
scripts.android:add: npx cap add android && npx cap sync android && node ../../tools/marble-run/sync-native-resources.mjs android
scripts.android:sync: npx cap sync android && node ../../tools/marble-run/sync-native-resources.mjs android
